response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely matching the job requirements. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent infrastructure and development
Proven track record of optimizing applications and contributing to architecture decisions
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java, though some exposure is mentioned
No direct mention of experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL, though MongoDB experience is noted

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct Nest.js and Vitest experience
